verses.text: “Kum sagih a cin' simin leiba maisakna na nei ding uh hi

Maisakna ding zia in: Leitawi a pia mi khempeuh in a vengte tungah leitawi-a a piaksate maisak ding hi. Topa' maisakna thu kigen khin ahih manin a vengpa, a sanggampa' tung pan kuamah in leiba siik nawnlo ding hi
Gamdang mite' tung pan na siik thei ding uh a, ahih hangin na sanggamte uh tung panin no-a' hong bat peuhmah na maisak ding uh hi

“Ahih hangin tuni-a kong gen hih thupiakna khempeuh zui-in Topa note' Pasian' aw na ngaih nak uh leh note' lakah a zawng omlo ding hi (bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un na neih dingun gamhluahin hong piak leitang tungah Topa in note thupha hong pia ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un hong ciamsa bangin note thupha hong pia ding a, minam tampi tungah leitawi na pia ding uh a, ahih hangin note in lei na tawi kei ding uh hi. Minam tampite na uk ding uh a, ahih hangin amaute in note hong uklo ding uh hi

“ Topa na Pasian un note hong piak gam sunga na khuate uh khat peuhpeuh sungah na sanggam khat uh note lakah a zawng a om leh na lungsim uh khauhsak loin, na sanggam zawngpa uh huhloin na om kei ding uh hi
Ama tungah na cingh gamtat ding uh a, bangbang hita leh ama kisap zah na leitawi ding uh hi

Na lungsim uhah ngaihsutna hoihlo omin, ‘Kum sagihna, maisakna kum hong nai hi,’ ci-in na sanggampa galmi etin amah bangmah na piakloh uh ciangin na langkhatah Topa' tungah amah kiko-in, no tungah khialhna a suahkhak ding kingaihsun un
Citna tawh amah na pia ding uh a, amah na piak uh ciangin lungsim neihna na nei kei ding uh hi. Topa na Pasian un na sepna na hihna khempeuh uhah hih thu hangin note thupha hong pia ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh leitang tungah mizawng bei ngeilo ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin, ‘Gam sungah a om na sanggampa, na a kisam mite leh mizawngte tungah na cingh mahmah ding uh hi,’ ci-in thu kong pia hi.

“Na sanggampa, Hebru pasal khat ahi a, Hebru numei khat ahi zongin nang tungah hong kizuak leh, amah in nangma na kum guk sung hong sem ding a, a kum sagihna ciangin nang kiang panin a suakta-in na paikhiasak ding hi
Na kiang panin a suakta-in na paikhiatsak ciangin khuthawm guakin na paisak kei ding hi
Na tuuhon lak, na ancilna leh na leenggah sukna panin citna tawh tampi na pia ding a, Topa na Pasian in nang thupha hong piak zahin amah na pia ding hi
Egypt gamah sila na hihna uh leh Topa na Pasian un note hong suahtaksakna na phawk ding uh hi. Tua ahih manin hih thu tuni-in kong pia hi
“Ahih hangin amah in note nuam hong sa-in, nang leh na innkuanpihte hong it ahih manin ‘Nang kiang panin ka paikhia kei ding hi,’ hong cih leh
phimpi khat la-in, kongkhak dapphahin a bil na vut ding a, na sila hi tawntung ding hi. Na sila numei zong tua bangmahin na hih ding hi

Na kiang panin a suakta-in amah na paisak ciangin haksa sa kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh a kicial nasem thaman lang tawh amah in nangma na kum guk sung hong sem khinzo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa na Pasian un na hihna khempeuh uhah thupha hong pia ding hi.

“Na bawnghon uh leh na tuuhon uh panin tacil a pa khempeuh Topa note' Pasian' tungah na ap ding uh hi. Na bawnghon tacilte uh tawh na na sem kei ding uh a, na tuuhon tacilte uh zong a mul na met kei ding uh hi
Topa in a teelna munah a kum kumin Topa note' Pasian' mai-ah na innkuanpihte uh tawh na ne ding uh hi
Ahih hangin poina khatpeuh, a khebai a mittaw, ahih kei leh poina lian khat peuhpeuh a neih leh, Topa note' Pasian' tungah biakna-in na pia kei ding uh hi
Na khuasung uhah na ne ding uh hi. Sanang ahi a, sakhi ahi zongin a kinek bangin mi nin leh mi siangte in a kibangin ne thei ding uh hi
A si na ne kei bek ding uh a, tui bangin leilakah a si na buakhia ding uh hi.
